| Attribute           | Value                           |

metadata.Constraint: No spaces in filenames (use underscores or hyphens).
metadata.H1 Singularity: The document must have exactly one H1 (`# Title`), typically following the UIP.
metadata.Indentation: STRICT 4-space indentation for all lists and sub-lists. 2-space indentation is a compliance violation.
metadata.Sectioning: - Use Roman Numerals for top-level headers (e.g., `## I. Overview`).
metadata.Location: The final section of the document, labeled `IV. Actionable Prompt Packet (APP)` (or appropriate Roman Numeral).
metadata.Structure: Must contain a table or blockquote defining specific `CMD:` triggers or `⚡ EXECUTE:` actions.
metadata.Type Hinting: Mandatory for all function signatures (`def func(a: int) -> str:`).
metadata.Docstrings: Google-style docstrings for all modules, classes, and functions.
metadata.Linter: Compliant with `Ruff` (no unused variables, no extensive line lengths).
metadata.Format: Markdown. Use backticks for all technical terms.
